revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Nakatsu Shrine
Copying from [[Category:Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] to [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Create shrine page for Nakatsu Shrine

Text replacement - "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei}}" to "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}}[[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]]"
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|中津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].
